location: On a corpse behind the stone coffin next to the hidden NPC Old Albus, up the hill east of the Village of the Albinaurics Site of Grace in Liurnia.

source.name: Corpse behind the stone coffin near Old Albus

tactics: From the Village of the Albinaurics grace, head east and uphill past two houses; striking the suspicious pot here reveals the hidden NPC Old Albus.
Check behind the stone coffin right next to Albus for the corpse holding the sickle — easy to miss while focused on talking to him.
No boss fight or enemy required, just a short detour off the path toward the village's boss arena.
lore: A sickle carved from ivory, carried by elderly Albinaurics as a token of their devotion to the Haligtree — a holy place none of them had actually lived to reach in person.

builds.name: Intelligence/Dex hybrid poke
builds.why: D scaling in both Dexterity and Intelligence with split physical/magic damage gives a sorcery-leaning dex build a lightweight melee option.

builds.name: Early Liurnia caster dagger
builds.why: Low stat requirements (6/11/13) make it an easy pickup right as Intelligence builds start touring Liurnia's academy content.
